mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description FROM roles WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, description FROM roles WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, name, description FROM roles
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (id, name, description) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM roles WHERE name = #{name}
